name: Sumo Group Plc
summary: Sumo Group Plc, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, and provides video games in the United Kingdom, India, and Canada. The company develops games across a range of console platforms, PC, handheld, and mobile devices. It also offers creative and development services to entertainment industry, including games, TV, films, and visual effects. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Sheffield, the United Kingdom.
